event: Architectural design of a decorative fireplace
description: A monochrome engraving depicting an elaborate fireplace design viewed straight on. The mantelpiece is richly ornamented with a central frieze featuring two horse-head motifs flanking a grotesque mask. Four standing draped female figures (caryatids) serve as supporting columns on either side. Inside the dark firebox, a decorative fan-shaped fire screen with classical motifs is visible. The entire composition is highly symmetrical with scrollwork, garlands, and architectural moldings.

_meta.title: Fireplace: in the frieze rython to two horse heads, hips 4 caryatids
